channel_style: friendly, energetic, short and punchy, with a focus on informative and entertaining content
idea_scoring_bias: prioritize ideas with high search volume, low competition, and high audience engagement
script_instruction_override: include a personal anecdote, example, or story in each script, and provide actionable tips and advice
thumbnail_style: use colorful, eye-catching, and high-contrast graphics with text overlays and emojis
hook_style: start with a surprising statistic, interesting fact, or thought-provoking question
cta_instruction: end each video with a clear call-to-action to like, comment, subscribe, and share the video with others
